1 Samuel 17

Select a column header to see its column.

Goliath’s Challenge

NoteGoliath was approximately 9 feet 9 inches or 297 centimeters tall; LXX, DSS, and Josephus four cubits and a span in height (approximately 6 feet 9 inches or 206 centimeters tall).
Note5,000 shekels is approximately 125.6 pounds or 57 kilograms.
Note600 shekels is approximately 15.1 pounds or 6.8 kilograms.

David Accepts the Challenge

NoteLXX and Syriac; Hebrew he had become advanced among men
NoteAn ephah is approximately 20 dry quarts or 22 liters of roasted grain.
NoteOr some token from them or some pledge from them

David Slays Goliath

NoteLXX; Hebrew of Gai; that is, of the valley
